raw_root_reproduction.reason: Claimed ticket explicitly requested a program-audit meta-study with no raw-ROOT reproduction.

winner.name: not_applicable_program_audit
winner.reason: This audit ranks coverage gaps and next directions rather than running a traditional-vs-ML benchmark.

top_next_direction.title: S17a GEANT4 energy+PID truth bridge
top_next_direction.expected_information_gain: Converts the largest missing truth handle, absolute energy and p/d PID, into a falsifiable calibration layer.

next_tickets.title: S17a GEANT4 energy+PID truth bridge
next_tickets.body: Connect /home/billy/ccb-geant4 to selected pulse support, propagate material-budget uncertainty, and benchmark charge/depth/PID action bands against simulated p/d truth. Expected information gain: separates support leakage from real per-event energy and p/d PID information.
